calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment (Equinox Holdings, Inc.)
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID WILLIAMS, ESQ. of Law Offices of David Williams, Tel No. 510-847-2356 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment (Equinox Holdings, Inc.) is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement does not appear to so far out of the ballpark of other Proposition 65 settlements that have been approved notwithstanding the de minimis civil penalty and the 25 times larger amount of fees to be paid to plaintiff's counsel. In other situations these or similar settlement terms might be grounds to ask the parties renegotiate their terms, but the court chooses not to make that request in this case. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Continued To May-04-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Continued To Feb-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment (24 Hour Fitness Usa, Inc.)
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Williams of Law Offices of David Williams telephone number 510-847-2356 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment (24 Hour Fitness USA, Inc.) is granted. No opposition filed and the moving papers provide sufficient support for the court's approval of the settlement. Order signed in open Court. Counsel is to submit a judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)
